---
title: "Tests for variable importance estimation"
author: "Stacy Cyrille"
date: last-modified
format: 
  html:
    keep-md: false
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    embed-resources: true
execute: 
  # echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
fig-width: 8
fig-align: "center"
fig-cap-location: top
html-math-method: mathml
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(MASS)
library(knitr)

rprojroot <- rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()
source(file.path(rprojroot, "R/utils.R"))
source(file.path(rprojroot, "R/generate_data.R"))
source(file.path(rprojroot, "R/pred_generators.R"))
```
